title: Looking for a Monday consultant / coach?

posts.author: DannyP (Danny P)
posts.cookedHtml:
Gday all,

I’m not a Monday expert but have used tools like Notion, coda, airtable for a long time.

I’m looking for an expert who I can engage hourly to give advice and guidance on our WorkOS build (which we’ve setup to run our health food company of 11 employees, soon to be more).

Someone who I can bounce ideas off, who can point me in the right direction if I’ve made errors in the setup. And someone who can give me some guidance as I optimise and maintain the system. Etc/.

We follow a ‘Scaling Up’ methodology, which is similar to OKR in its approach, so having an idea about this would be very handy.

I’m in Australia (Brisbane Time) and my best availability is most weekday mornings.

Thanks all,
Danny

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Gday to you too, @DannyP,

My company, Kick Consulting, specialises in everything monday related for scaling companies. We are one of monday.com’s official Australian Channel Partners (based on the East Coast).

We offer consulting/coaching as well as build solid foundation for our clients using monday and help them get the best from their setup. We can also train and support you and your team. Here are some of our client’s testimonials.

You can book the complimentary 60-min intro meeting through here.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Elena
ceo | founder

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @DannyP and thanks for posting in the community forums!

I work with CarbonWeb and we are monday.com Channel Partners specializing in process workflows and custom solutions. We love to get our hands dirty with the monday.com program but have also provided holistic consulting for power users.

We currently offer a consulting package for a one-time fee that will allow you to schedule dedicated time with one of our solution architects to discuss your environment, ideas, and ultimately point you in the right direction to advance your workflow.

If you would like to learn a bit more feel free to schedule with me here: Consultation - Ricky
Or even send an email over from my signature below.

Good luck as you further establish your monday.com Work OS!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
